title: Oscars 2026 Best Picture Nominees Ranked by Tomatometer
text: The Academy Awards ceremony took place on March 15, 2026, with ten films competing for Best Picture. By Rotten Tomatoes Tomatometer: The Secret Agent leads with 98% directed by Kleber Mendonça Filho as a thematically rich and visually arresting political thriller set in 1977 Brazil. Sinners ranks second at 97%, a rip-roaring fusion of masterful visual storytelling from Ryan Coogler with a vampire-themed narrative. Sentimental Value at 95% directed by Joachim Trier. Train Dreams at 94% directed by Clint Bentley. One Battle After Another at 94% directed by Paul Thomas Anderson. Marty Supreme at 93% directed by Josh Safdie. Bugonia at 87% directed by Yorgos Lanthimos. Hamnet at 87% directed by Chloé Zhao. Frankenstein at 85% directed by Guillermo del Toro. F1 The Movie at 82% directed by Joseph Kosinski. The lineup spans multiple genres, from sports dramas to intimate character studies, offering diverse storytelling approaches.
